chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6929 of 2019 Naveed Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. Dated: 02.05.2025 None for petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant Advocate General. -.-.- This is an old case of 2019, which is over six years ago. Since its inception on 31.10.2019 over six years ago learned counsel for the petitioner has not appeared in this petition. Today despite lapse of over six years none is present for the petitioner without any intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in the petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches Judge
